guild-card-award.description.aa-01: Proof of being a Fire Village Hunter. Granting this certificate, may you safely hunt.
guild-card-award.description.aa-02: Proof of successful hunting of the Resentful Tiger Dragon. The treasure knife passed down from generation to generation in the village is a symbol of the villagers' guide.
guild-card-award.description.aa-04: Successfully defeated the testimony of the Dragon Night Overlord. The scars left on the sharp claws that turned into weapons told about the magnificent life of the original owner.
guild-card-award.description.aa-08: Successfully repelled the proof of the Wind Dragon. In this painting awarded, Nien Fengmin drew the beginning and end of the retreat from the enemy.
guild-card-award.description.aa-10: Proof of successful repulsion of Aeolosaurus and Thorosaurus. On the ancient picture scroll depicting a hundred dragons walking in the night, there are two giant dragons that are rich in years.
guild-card-award.description.aa-20: Proof of completion of Quests under many Hub. Souvenirs given by the Guild.
guild-card-award.description.aa-40: Proof of completing many dragon night missions. Souvenirs given by the Guild.
guild-card-award.description.aa-80: Proof of completing 50 missions at an abandoned shrine. A necklace made of divine wood branches.
guild-card-award.description.bb-01: Proof of 50 missions in the Frozen Islands. Frozen in ancient treasures.
guild-card-award.description.bb-02: Proof of completing 50 missions in a waterless forest. Buried in the depths of the ruins.
guild-card-award.description.bb-04: Proof of completing 50 missions in Shawara. Rare cactus ring in silver white.
guild-card-award.description.bb-08: Proof of completing 50 missions in the Lava Cave. Red and cyan crystals intersect.
guild-card-award.description.bb-10: Proof of completion of many Side-Quests. A bouquet of appreciative flowers.
guild-card-award.description.bb-20: Launch Qixiang to move, reaching a cumulative proof of 1000 times. Ride the wind for thousands of miles.
guild-card-award.description.bb-40: Proof of multiple rides on dental hounds. After a long journey, the canine saddle is unusually worn.
guild-card-award.description.bb-80: Proof of many camps unlocked. The scars on it all had corresponding memories.
guild-card-award.description.cc-01: Proof of many giant flying insects setpoints was found. The giant flying insects on it were vivid and beautiful.
guild-card-award.description.cc-02: Obtain a total of 500 proofs of hunting creatures. The hunting tools on it were vivid and beautiful.
guild-card-award.description.cc-04: Collect a total of 1000 golden ladybugs and golden ladybugs. The golden spirit ladybug on it was vivid and beautiful.
guild-card-award.description.cc-08: Many handwritten certificates were found. The pattern is full of flair.
guild-card-award.description.cc-10: Proof of successful catching many fish. The nameless fishing rod inadvertently became a master rod in every shot.
guild-card-award.description.cc-20: Proof of successful roasting of roasted meat 30 times. This certificate is issued by a suspicious group called BBQ Promotion.
guild-card-award.description.cc-40: Proof of many hunting creatures was photographed. As hunters, they gain useful knowledge and experience.
guild-card-award.description.cc-80: Proofs of many rare creatures were photographed. This medal is awarded by an enthusiastic ecological researcher.
guild-card-award.description.dd-01: Many certificates of environmental organisms were photographed. Your achievements in ecological research have been recognized by the Guild.
guild-card-award.description.dd-02: Proof of earning a total of 1 million dollars. The luxurious genuine gold workmanship makes it heavier than it looks.
guild-card-award.description.dd-04: Obtain a cumulative certificate of 100,000 flame points. Although it has been used for a long time, it feels smooth and full of shine.
guild-card-award.description.dd-08: Proof that 50 attendants have been hired. Thank you for giving us so many job opportunities, meow.
guild-card-award.description.dd-10: Proof of a total of 100 dispatches to accompany the covert team on a mission.
guild-card-award.description.dd-20: Gather proof of all retriever gear. Daily maintenance is essential for long-term use.
guild-card-award.description.dd-40: Proof that many valuable weapons and armor were produced. The selection of materials is exquisite, which is no different from the real product.
guild-card-award.description.dd-80: Proof of many replacement techniques obtained. Not only skills, but also physical and mental people who have been exercising for a long time will be awarded this certificate.
guild-card-award.description.ee-01: Proof of struggling to enrich the snack bar menu. The lively sound of the tea shop seemed to be right in your ears.
guild-card-award.description.ee-02: Proof from someone who loves Fukumi Bunny costumes. A specially made suitcase that can properly hold the clothing of the Fukumi rabbit.
guild-card-award.description.ee-04: Proof of dialogue with many villagers. Wear it and walk like a fleece blanket, so you don't feel tired at all.
guild-card-award.description.ee-08: Proof of the hunt for 1,000 large monsters.
guild-card-award.description.ee-10: Proof of hunting a total of 5 monsters in 1 expedition.
guild-card-award.description.ee-20: Proof of mastery over many monsters.
guild-card-award.description.ee-40: Only the extreme hunter can challenge the difficulty, which is a proof of mastering high-difficulty quests. A folding fan depicting the scene of the battle.
guild-card-award.description.ee-80: Proof of completing many of the Quests of the Arena Quest. Souvenirs given by the Guild.
guild-card-award.description.ff-01: Proof of workout to the highest level of the various support types for the follower, Ellie Cat.
guild-card-award.description.ff-02: Obtained many certificates of appearance equipment. The colors are colorful and will never bore the viewer.
guild-card-award.description.ff-04: Obtained many proofs of flower chains. Decorate the house and the interior will be full of fragrance.
guild-card-award.description.ff-08: Successfully defeated the proof of the Alien Sky Comet Dragon. The exquisite folding fan depicts the mysterious red glow of hero versus hero.
guild-card-award.description.ff-10: Claiming to dominate Infernal Springs, the hardest quest, which was close to the ultimate proof of the hunter. A folding fan depicting the scene of the Overlord.
guild-card-award.description.ff-20: Proof of completing the Quests at the top of many Hub. Souvenirs given by the Guild.
guild-card-award.description.ff-40: Proof of many decorations and hanging scrolls collected. This lock is strong and secure to protect important items from theft.
guild-card-award.description.ff-80: In the hunting record, get the proof of the smallest golden crown of many monsters.
guild-card-award.description.gg-01: In the hunting record, obtain the proof of the largest golden crown of many monsters.
guild-card-award.description.gg-02: Awarded only to the Ultimate Hunter who has gathered all the medals.
guild-card-award.description.gg-04: Entrusted by the Kingdom to assist in the verification of the observation post. The kingdom officially issued a power of attorney to the village hunters.
guild-card-award.description.gg-08: Proof of struggle to investigate. New telescopes can see things clearly in the distance.
guild-card-award.description.gg-10: Proof of a successful hunt for the newly entangled beast. Protect the wearer even in extremely harsh investigative environments.
guild-card-award.description.gg-20: Proof of a successful Ice Wolf Dragon hunt. A gift from Fiorina, a pen decorated with beautiful blue feathers.
guild-card-award.description.gg-40: Proof of successful crusade against Jue Yinlong. The flag on the solemn kingdom table is a testament to the holder's achievements.
guild-card-award.description.gg-80: A testimony to the hunters who have made tremendous contributions to the peace of the kingdom. Letter of gratitude for assistance formally granted by the Kingdom.
guild-card-award.description.hh-01: Proof of completion of many Assembly Master level Quests. Souvenirs given by the Guild.
guild-card-award.description.hh-02: Proof of a good relationship with the young white Fukuoka rabbits who live in El Gard. Small size and large capacity.
guild-card-award.description.hh-04: Proof of completing more Skill Combat Assignments. Souvenirs given by the Guild.
guild-card-award.description.hh-08: Proof of completing many allied peer missions. Paintings that bless the village and the observation post are allied forever.
guild-card-award.description.hh-10: Proof of completion of many important investigative Quests. The leisurely appearance of swimming in the blue sky is lifelike.
guild-card-award.description.hh-20: Proof of deep bonding with many allies. It is said that drinking together with this cup can deepen the friendship between the two sides.
guild-card-award.description.hh-40: Proof of completing many Anomaly Quests. The mating insects on the painting are creepy.
guild-card-award.description.hh-80: Proof of completing 50 missions in the dense forest. A talisman that protects the safety of long-distance voyages.
guild-card-award.description.ii-01: Proof of completing 50 missions in Citadel Heights. Brooch set with shiny amber.
guild-card-award.description.ii-02: Proof of undertaking and resolving various commissions, whether in a village or at an observation post.
guild-card-award.description.ii-04: Proof of unlocking numerous dense forests and citadel highland camps. It is convenient to set up camp with your eyes closed.
guild-card-award.description.ii-08: Proofs of numerous dense forest and citadel highland flight insect set-points have been found.
guild-card-award.description.ii-10: Proofs of many handwritten notes were found in the dense forests and citadel heights. The old thing that was found with the notebook did not age in the slightest.
guild-card-award.description.ii-20: Proofs of many highland creatures living mainly in dense forests and citadels were photographed. The photo frame is elegant and highlights the photo.
guild-card-award.description.ii-40: Obtained proof of more replacement techniques. Thousands of hammers and hundreds of refined skills are outstanding, even beyond the reach of manpower.
guild-card-award.description.ii-80: Proof that more valuable weapon armor was produced. Cool helmet with stylish feathers.
guild-card-award.description.jj-01: Proof that more valuable exterior equipment has been produced. A handsome helmet with luxurious gold carvings and blue feathers.
guild-card-award.description.jj-02: Gather more evidence of furnishings and façades. This lock was indestructible, and even if she tried her best, she wouldn't move.
guild-card-award.description.jj-04: After leaving the village and coming to El Garde, he also helped the refreshment shop to make a proof of the new group. Business is booming!
guild-card-award.description.jj-08: The testimony of the doughnut gourmand proves that he has eaten many doughnuts with a jumping bamboo stick. Pour in the honey and be happy.
guild-card-award.description.jj-10: Proof of various techniques can be learned at the entourage dojo. The doll tooth spaniel snuggles up intimately with Ellie Cat.
guild-card-award.description.jj-20: Have the attendant bring proof of many transactions with the introductory letter. Unknowingly, the follower held the necklace.
guild-card-award.description.jj-40: Unlock proof of many reconnaissance locations. The rustic sound of the flute can be heard far away.
guild-card-award.description.jj-80: Let the toothhound learn the proof of various tricks. Awarded to hardworking tooth dogs, rewarded crispy and delicious.
guild-card-award.description.kk-01: Proof of great retinue with many skillful memories. Cute acorns painted with paint.
guild-card-award.description.kk-02: Proof of using a book that switches quickly many times. Be able to ride freely on the hunting ground upwind.
guild-card-award.description.kk-04: Various proofs of dragons were made with the help of the power of the Transforming Phantom Insect.
guild-card-award.description.kk-08: Proof of many items received everywhere. I didn't expect to receive it with the bag...
guild-card-award.description.kk-10: Proof of dialogue with people at many observation sites. You can put it on at once, and you can run right away, which is great for sandals when you are out and about.
guild-card-award.description.kk-20: Proof of hunting 100 large monsters of master level.
guild-card-award.description.kk-40: Proof of hunting 500 large monsters of master level.
guild-card-award.description.kk-80: Proof of the hunting of 1,000 large monsters of master level.
guild-card-award.description.ll-01: In the hunting record, get the proof of the smallest golden crown of almost all monsters.
guild-card-award.description.ll-02: In the hunting record, get the proof of the largest golden crown of almost all monsters.
guild-card-award.description.ll-04: Proof of the first crusade against a monstrous monster.
guild-card-award.description.ll-10: Proof of significant contributions to Anomaly research. The mechanism of Anomalyness is documented in detail.
guild-card-award.description.ll-20: Proof of clearing high-level Anomaly Investigation quests.
guild-card-award.description.ll-40: Proof of repeated use of the Institute of Anomaly. Bahari made a small model with his own hands, and it will walk on a good wind.
guild-card-award.description.ll-80: Proof of the Anomaly refining of many weapons. With these hands, you can safely and securely touch dangerous materials.
guild-card-award.description.mm-01: Proof of the Anomaly refining of many armor. Cuts gems, no matter how fragile, without scratch.
guild-card-award.description.mm-02: Proof that the first crusade against the monsters overcame the monsters.
guild-card-award.description.mm-04: Proof of defeating 15 monsters and overcoming monsters.
guild-card-award.description.mm-08: A testament to the great heroes of those who have gathered many medals.

guild-card-award.name.cc-80: Honorary Silver Medal in Biological Research
guild-card-award.name.dd-01: Honorary Gold Medal in Biological Research
